audience: Newcastle NSW small business owners and local residents looking for services
brand_voice: professional, helpful, locally focused, and knowledgeable about Newcastle NSW

prompt_config.target_audience: Newcastle NSW small business owners and local residents seeking digital marketing, SEO, and online business services
prompt_config.language_instruction: English (Australian English spelling — colour, honour, organise, etc.) with a Newcastle NSW local flavour
prompt_config.tone_style:
- Professional, helpful, and locally focused
- Knowledgeable about Newcastle, Hunter Region, and NSW business landscape
- Practical and action-oriented — give readers steps they can act on today
- Avoid jargon; explain technical terms when first introduced
prompt_config.extra_instructions:
This article is for Newcastle Hub (newcastlehub.info), a digital marketing and local SEO service for Newcastle NSW businesses.
- DO NOT mention candy, food, retail products, or confectionery of any kind.
- DO NOT mention SweetsWorld or any unrelated brands.
- All examples, analogies, and use-cases must relate to service businesses (tradies, cafes, professional services, retail shops) in Newcastle or the Hunter Region.
- When recommending tools or platforms, prefer ones commonly used by Australian small businesses.
- Internal links should point to newcastlehub.info pages only (services, free audit, contact).
